message:
test(bd-3s1x): cover remaining subscriber.rs branches

Add 4 new tests for logging subscriber covering: FieldCollector typed
record methods (bool, i64, u64, f64), record_debug format, builder
Default matches new, and with_max_width(None) clearing.
